hooks.description: [Phase 3 cutover] Soft cleanup checklist after gh pr merge (replaces post-merge-cleanup-reminder.sh)
[Phase 2 new] After successful gh pr create or gh pr ready, emit additionalContext to arm Monitor + MONITOR_ARM_REQUIRED sentinel (ATTACK 9)
[Phase 3 cutover] Block edits to architecture/** without ARCH_PLAN_EVIDENCE env (replaces pre-edit-architecture.sh)
[Phase 3 cutover] Gate 1: refuse writes to blocking-class capability paths without ARCH_PLAN_EVIDENCE (replaces pre-write-capability-gate.sh; sunset 2026-08-04)
[Phase 2 new] Block edits to .claude/settings.json or .claude/hooks/** without operator-signed sentinel (ATTACK 2 / OD-HOOK-2)
[Phase 3 cutover] Run invariant pytest baseline before any git commit and block on regressions (replaces pre-commit-invariant-test.sh)
[Phase 3 cutover] Run gitleaks against staged content before any git commit; honors .gitleaks.toml allowlist (replaces pre-commit-secrets.sh)
[Phase 3 cutover] Conflict-first guidance + MERGE_AUDIT_EVIDENCE validation on protected branches (replaces pre-merge-contamination-check.sh)
[Phase 3 cutover] Block broad git add in main worktree (co-tenant absorption risk) (replaces cotenant-staging-guard.sh)
[Phase 2 new] Block git checkout/switch when tracked modifications overlap target branch tree (silent revert prevention)
[Phase 2 new] Advisory: warn when gh pr create invoked with <2 commits or <80 LOC since base (paid auto-reviewer cost)
[Phase 2 new] Advisory: when phase-class subagent returns with tracked uncommitted changes, emit commit reminder
